nasb.text: Then he took up his discourse and said, “Arise, O Balak, and hear; Give ear to me, O son of Zippor!

esv.text: And Balaam took up his discourse and said, “Rise, Balak, and hear; give ear to me, O son of Zippor:

cnv.text: 巴蘭作歌，說： “巴勒啊，要起來聽； 西撥的兒子啊，側耳聽我。

ccb.text: 巴兰吟诗预言说： “巴勒啊，要留心听！ 西拨的儿子啊，请听我言。
